panels.title: Request Rate by Protocol
panels.description: RQ = request. HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 breakdown per inbound listener.

panels.title: RBAC Denied
panels.description: Requests denied by Envoy RBAC filter (MeshTrafficPermission). Rate = denied/sec, total = cumulative.

panels.title: TLS Handshakes
panels.description: SSL/TLS handshake rate. Outbound = per upstream cluster, Inbound = listener-level.

panels.title: Certificate Expiry
panels.description: 0 is normal — Kuma rotates mTLS certs every 24h
Requires MeshRetry policy. Retry = attempted, Success = retry succeeded, Overflow = retry budget exhausted.
panels.title: Retries
Timeouts
panels.description: CX Connect Timeout = TCP connect timed out. RQ Timeout = request-level timeout. Max Duration = stream hit max duration limit.

panels.title: Request Resets & Cancellations
panels.description: RX Reset = upstream reset the response. TX Reset = local proxy reset the request. Cancelled = client cancelled before completion.

panels.title: Upstream Endpoint Health
panels.description: Health ratio per destination (healthy/total). Green = 100%, yellow = degraded, red = unhealthy.

panels.title: Circuit Breaker State
panels.description: RQ Open = request circuit breaker tripped. RQ Pending Open = pending request limit hit. CX Open = connection limit hit.

panels.title: Overflow & Routing Errors
panels.description: CX Overflow = connection pool full. RQ Pending Overflow = pending queue full. No Route = no matching route found. LB Panic = too few healthy hosts, load balancer in panic mode.

panels.title: Remaining CB Capacity
panels.description: Remaining request (rq), connection (cx), and pending slots before circuit breaker trips. 0 = actively rejecting.

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: CX = connection. Active downstream connections from clients to this workload.

panels.title: Connection Resets
panels.description: Remote Close = client closed the connection. Local Close = Envoy closed the connection.

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: CX = connection. Active upstream connections to destination services.

panels.title: Connection Resets
panels.description: Remote Close = upstream closed the connection. Local Close = Envoy closed the connection.

panels.title: Connection Timing (p99)
panels.description: Connect Time = TCP handshake duration. Connection Length = total lifetime of a connection.

panels.title: Throughput
panels.description: RX = bytes received from clients, TX = bytes transmitted to clients.

panels.title: Inflight Requests
panels.description: Active downstream requests currently being processed by this workload.

panels.title: Throughput
panels.description: RX = bytes received from upstream, TX = bytes transmitted to upstream services.

panels.title: Inflight Requests
panels.description: RQ Pending = waiting for a connection from the pool. RQ Active = currently being processed by upstream.

panels.title: Requests per Connection
panels.description: RQ per CX = how many requests are multiplexed over each connection. Higher values indicate good connection reuse (HTTP/2).

panels.title: DNS Request Rate
panels.description: Rate of DNS queries handled by the Kuma DNS server in the sidecar.

panels.title: DNS Latency
panels.description: Local = Kuma DNS resolution time. Upstream = time to forward queries to the upstream resolver (e.g. CoreDNS).
